summary: Full backend test suite for Edu Plus API executed against the public preview URL. All 20 tests passed (100%) including JWT auth (register/login/me + duplicate/invalid), seeded team (4 members) & packages (3), questions endpoints (initial=true returns 5 questions WITHOUT 'correct' field for both romana and matematica), test submission for both subjects (initial flag flips has_initial_eval), AI study-plan via Emergent LLM Key + Claude Sonnet 4.5 (correctly blocked with 400 before initial eval; returns Romanian plan after eval), dashboard, leaderboard sorted desc by points, and Stripe payments (valid checkout returns url+session_id, invalid package_id rejected with 400, payment status polling works, 404 for unknown session_id).
critical_code_review_comments: /api/auth/me uses HTTPBearer with auto_error=False but returns 401 explicitly when no creds — fine. Consider 403 vs 401 consistency.
submit_test divides by total without explicit guard against total=0 in non-empty list path; currently safe but consider 400 if answers list empty.
AI study-plan stores generated text in users.ai_plan with no length cap — acceptable for now.
Webhook endpoint /api/webhook/stripe is not under authentication (expected) and relies on Stripe-Signature header — emergentintegrations handles validation; OK.
PACKAGES dict is hardcoded; acceptable for MVP but consider moving to DB for editability.
server.py is 551 lines — close to 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, tests, ai, payments) as it grows.
test_credentials: Auto-created random test users via /api/auth/register (email pattern test.student.<uuid>@eduplus.ro, password Test123!). No pre-seeded accounts exist; documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Startup seed_data() seeds 4 team members and 20 questions (10 romana + 10 matematica, 5 initial + 5 practice each) idempotently. Verified live.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints are passing on https://nationals-ready.preview.emergentagent.com/api. AI study-plan via Emergent LLM Key + Claude Sonnet 4.5 confirmed working (real call, ~5-10s latency). Stripe checkout with sk_test_emergent works end-to-end (session creation + status polling). Reuse /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py for regression. For frontend tests, use the same auto-register flow.
